description_long: This skyscraper features a tall, slender tower with a modern glass and concrete facade, accented by vertical blue and white patterns that create a striking visual effect. The main tower is accompanied by a lower, rectangular annex building at its base, which appears to house additional commercial or office spaces. The facade of the tower is dominated by large vertical glass panels interspersed with white structural elements, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The annex has a flat roof with green-tinted skylights and a series of horizontal window bands, contrasting with the verticality of the main tower. The base of the structure is set on a broad, flat platform, likely representing a plaza or entryway. No visible signage or logos are present, emphasizing the building's clean, modernist lines.
description: A tall, modern skyscraper with a glass and concrete facade, featuring vertical blue and white accents and an attached lower annex with horizontal windows.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the skyscraper with minimal window detail and a clear view of the annex's roof and horizontal window bands.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showcasing the vertical glass panels, blue and white accents, and the main entrance at the base of the tower.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the verticality of the tower, the glass facade, and the connection between the main building and the annex.
description_view_3: The rear side of the building is shown, with the annex's windows and roof details more prominent, and fewer vertical facade features visible on the tower.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features large vertical glass panels framed by white concrete structural elements, with blue accent stripes running the height of the tower. The annex displays horizontal window bands and a flat roof with green-tinted skylights, contrasting with the tower's vertical emphasis.
